themes.exampleQuote: Sahil has been very kind & helpful with accepting custom orders whenever I come with my friends.
Delicious food! Authentic flavors! Must visit place.
The person taking the order has the audacity to ask if it was my first time in the US.
Reva Modern Indian Cuisine is hands down our number one restaurant in Pittsburgh.
Sahil has been very kind & helpful with accepting custom orders.

notable_quote: Reva first opened in June 2024 and I have been a regular customer ever since, the food taste is the best you can find in Pittsburgh and no other Indian restaurant can match the level.
sentiment_summary: Reviewers consistently praise the food's authenticity and single out Sahil by name for attentive, flexible service, but a pattern of staff rudeness complaints, including one incident involving a condescending remark to a customer about the roti, pulls the sentiment signal below where the raw star count suggests it should be.
quarter_narrative: Thirty-three independent creators filmed Reva this quarter, generating 373,326 TikTok plays without a single post from the restaurant itself. The most-viewed clip, @gabs_joella's 66,300-play video, was made by a daughter promoting her mother's restaurant, a detail that tells you everything about where the energy around this place is coming from and who is doing the work of spreading it. In the Pittsburgh Asian Kitchens family, Mola leads on creator collaboration fit; Reva leads on Indian-specific ranking and sits fourth overall, a position that reflects real momentum rather than a finished climb. Closing the gap with Mola depends less on the food, which reviewers defend without hesitation, and more on whether Reva starts meeting its creators where they already are.
tldr_read: City creators are driving hundreds of thousands of views while Reva's own Instagram has been silent for 72 days. Ones to Watch, #1 in Pittsburgh Indian restaurants.
tldr_meaning: The conversion path is fully built and creator interest is unusually high, but the Instagram signal going dark for over two months means the business is not compounding any of that outside attention into its own audience.

diagnosis_pullquote.line: First In Indian, Powered By 33 Creators. The Restaurant's Own Feed Has Gone Quiet.

playbook.headline: Restart Instagram before the signal flatlines
playbook.action: The account has been dark for 72 days with a 37.85% engagement rate waiting to activate, one post restarts the clock.

playbook.headline: Turn creator videos into owned content
playbook.action: Thirty-three creators have already shot footage here this quarter; reposting even five of those clips closes the gap between outside reach and the restaurant's own feed.

playbook.headline: Address the service inconsistency publicly
playbook.action: Two negative reviews cite specific staff interactions by detail; a direct, non-defensive response on each lifts sentiment visibility for the 80% of reviewers who praise the experience.
